# Admiral DS — Standalone Component Library Plan

> **For agentic workers:** REQUIRED SUB-SKILL: Use superpowers:subagent-driven-development (recommended) or superpowers:executing-plans to implement this plan task-by-task. Steps use checkbox (`- [ ]`) syntax for tracking.

**Goal:** Extract the Specd/Admiral design system into a standalone, framework-agnostic TypeScript component library (`@specd/admiral-ds`) that compiles to Web Components and auto-generated React wrappers from a single source.

**Architecture:** Write once in Lit (Web Components), build twice — `dist/web-components/` for Figma plugins and vanilla web, `dist/react/` for React web apps (auto-generated via `@lit/react`). Single CSS token source shared across all outputs.

**Tech Stack:** Lit 3, TypeScript 5, Vite (lib mode), `@lit/react`, Storybook 8 (with web-components renderer), Vitest, `@custom-elements-manifest/analyzer`

**Source of truth for existing components:** `/Users/home/Desktop/code/pulse/src/design-system/specd-ds.ts` (~50 components, all typed) and `/Users/home/Desktop/code/pulse/src/design-system/specd-ds.css` (~2400 lines of tokens + component styles).

---

## Decisions already made

- **Path C (dual output)** chosen: Web Components primary, React wrappers auto-generated
- **No Shadow DOM** — light DOM rendering so global CSS applies and Figma plugin event delegation is unbroken
- **Lit** as the WC authoring framework (same pattern as Shoelace, Material Web, Carbon)
- **Local workspace link** during dev so the Pulse plugin consumes it immediately via `"@specd/admiral-ds": "file:../admiral-ds"`
- **React is generated**, not hand-written — `@lit/react` wraps each element automatically
- **Existing `specd-ds.ts`** has all props interfaces and factory functions — these are the migration source, not a rewrite from scratch

## What exists today in the plugin (migration source)

Located at `/Users/home/Desktop/code/pulse/src/design-system/`:

| File | Content |
|---|---|
| `specd-ds.ts` | 1,817 lines — ~50 components as typed factory functions |
| `specd-wc.ts` | 246 lines — 6 WC wrappers (Button, Chip, Badge, Progress, ScoreRing, StatTile) with a blocking `import.meta.url` defect on line 35 |
| `specd-ds.css` | ~2,400 lines — all design tokens + component class rules |
| `specd-preview.html` | Storybook-style static HTML catalogue (manual, not auto-updating) |
| `icons.ts` | Icon SVG strings |

### Components already typed (migration candidates in priority order)

**Tier 1 — Core UI primitives (start here)**
Button, Chip/FilterChip, Input, Toggle, Badge, Card, Divider, ProgressBar, Avatar

**Tier 2 — Plugin-specific compound components**
CoverageRow, StatTile, ScoreRing, HealthBadge, TabBar, IssueCard, AIPill, JumpButton

**Tier 3 — Advanced / overlay components**
Modal, Drawer, Toast, Tooltip, Popover, DataTable, Pagination, Breadcrumb, Stepper

**Tier 4 — Specd-specific domain components**
QfReplaceRow, IssueRow, PropertyFixRow, ChooseVarModal, SegmentedToggle

---

## New repo location

Create `admiral-ds/` as a sibling to the pulse plugin:

```
~/Desktop/code/
  pulse/              ← existing Figma plugin
  admiral-ds/         ← NEW standalone library
```

Or as a monorepo with the plugin — TBD based on team preference.

---

## File structure target

```
admiral-ds/
  src/
    components/
      Button/
        AdmiralButton.ts        ← Lit component (extends LitElement)
        AdmiralButton.css.ts    ← CSS tagged template (inlined into component)
        AdmiralButton.types.ts  ← exported ButtonProps interface
        AdmiralButton.stories.ts ← Storybook story
        AdmiralButton.test.ts   ← Vitest unit test
        index.ts                ← re-exports
      Chip/
      Input/
      Toggle/
      Badge/
      Card/
      ... (one folder per component)
    tokens/
      colors.css        ← --navy, --lime, --blue etc.
      typography.css    ← font families, scale
      spacing.css       ← spacing scale
      index.css         ← @import all tokens (the new specd-ds.css)
    index.ts            ← barrel: exports all components + types
    react.ts            ← barrel: exports all @lit/react wrappers
  dist/
    web-components/     ← built output (not committed)
    react/              ← built output (not committed)
  .storybook/
  package.json
  vite.config.ts        ← lib mode, two build targets
  tsconfig.json
  vitest.config.ts
  custom-elements.json  ← generated by CEM analyzer
```

---

## Consumption in the Pulse plugin (during dev)

```json
// pulse/package.json
{
  "dependencies": {
    "@specd/admiral-ds": "file:../admiral-ds"
  }
}
```

```ts
// pulse/src/ui.ts
import '@specd/admiral-ds';           // registers all custom elements
import '@specd/admiral-ds/tokens.css'; // CSS tokens

// ui.html can then use:
// <admiral-button variant="primary">Scan now</admiral-button>
// <admiral-chip label="Critical" count="3"></admiral-chip>
```

## Consumption in a React web app

```tsx
// web-app/src/App.tsx
import { AdmiralButton, AdmiralChip } from '@specd/admiral-ds/react';
import '@specd/admiral-ds/tokens.css';

export function App() {
  return <AdmiralButton variant="primary" onClick={handleScan}>Scan now</AdmiralButton>;
}
```

## Task 1: Scaffold the `admiral-ds` repo

**Files to create:**
- `admiral-ds/package.json`
- `admiral-ds/tsconfig.json`
- `admiral-ds/vite.config.ts` (lib mode, dual output)
- `admiral-ds/vitest.config.ts`
- `admiral-ds/.storybook/main.ts` (web-components renderer)
- `admiral-ds/.storybook/preview.ts`
- `admiral-ds/src/index.ts` (empty barrel)
- `admiral-ds/src/react.ts` (empty barrel)
- `admiral-ds/src/tokens/` (split from specd-ds.css)

- [ ] **Step 1: Create repo directory**

```bash
mkdir -p ~/Desktop/code/admiral-ds/src/components
mkdir -p ~/Desktop/code/admiral-ds/src/tokens
mkdir -p ~/Desktop/code/admiral-ds/.storybook
cd ~/Desktop/code/admiral-ds && git init
```

- [ ] **Step 2: Write `package.json`**

```json
{
  "name": "@specd/admiral-ds",
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "type": "module",
  "main": "./dist/web-components/index.cjs.js",
  "module": "./dist/web-components/index.esm.js",
  "exports": {
    ".": {
      "import": "./dist/web-components/index.esm.js",
      "require": "./dist/web-components/index.cjs.js"
    },
    "./react": {
      "import": "./dist/react/index.esm.js"
    },
    "./tokens.css": "./dist/tokens.css"
  },
  "types": "./dist/web-components/index.d.ts",
  "files": ["dist"],
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "storybook dev -p 6006",
    "build": "vite build && vite build --config vite.react.config.ts",
    "build:analyze": "cem analyze --globs 'src/**/*.ts'",
    "test": "vitest run",
    "test:watch": "vitest",
    "storybook": "storybook dev -p 6006",
    "build-storybook": "storybook build"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "lit": "^3.0.0"
  },
  "peerDependencies": {
    "react": ">=18.0.0",
    "react-dom": ">=18.0.0"
  },
  "peerDependenciesMeta": {
    "react": { "optional": true },
    "react-dom": { "optional": true }
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@lit/react": "^1.0.0",
    "@custom-elements-manifest/analyzer": "^0.10.0",
    "@storybook/web-components": "^8.0.0",
    "@storybook/web-components-vite": "^8.0.0",
    "@types/react": "^18.0.0",
    "typescript": "^5.0.0",
    "vite": "^5.0.0",
    "vite-plugin-dts": "^3.0.0",
    "vitest": "^1.0.0"
  }
}
```

- [ ] **Step 3: Write `vite.config.ts` (WC output)**

```ts
import { defineConfig } from 'vite';
import dts from 'vite-plugin-dts';

export default defineConfig({
  build: {
    lib: {
      entry: 'src/index.ts',
      name: 'AdmiralDS',
      formats: ['es', 'cjs'],
      fileName: (format) => `index.${format === 'es' ? 'esm' : 'cjs'}.js`,
    },
    outDir: 'dist/web-components',
    rollupOptions: {
      external: ['react', 'react-dom', '@lit/react'],
    },
  },
  plugins: [dts({ outDir: 'dist/web-components' })],
});
```

- [ ] **Step 4: Write `vite.react.config.ts` (React output)**

```ts
import { defineConfig } from 'vite';
import dts from 'vite-plugin-dts';

export default defineConfig({
  build: {
    lib: {
      entry: 'src/react.ts',
      name: 'AdmiralDSReact',
      formats: ['es'],
      fileName: () => 'index.esm.js',
    },
    outDir: 'dist/react',
    rollupOptions: {
      external: ['react', 'react-dom', '@lit/react', 'lit'],
    },
  },
  plugins: [dts({ outDir: 'dist/react' })],
});
```

- [ ] **Step 5: Write tsconfig.json**

```json
{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "target": "ES2021",
    "module": "ESNext",
    "moduleResolution": "bundler",
    "lib": ["ES2021", "DOM", "DOM.Iterable"],
    "strict": true,
    "declaration": true,
    "declarationMap": true,
    "sourceMap": true,
    "experimentalDecorators": true,
    "useDefineForClassFields": false,
    "outDir": "dist",
    "rootDir": "src"
  },
  "include": ["src"]
}
```

- [ ] **Step 6: Install dependencies**

```bash
cd ~/Desktop/code/admiral-ds
npm install
```

- [ ] **Step 7: Verify build runs clean**

```bash
npm run build
```

Expected: `dist/web-components/index.esm.js`, `dist/web-components/index.d.ts` created (empty barrel, so tiny files).

- [ ] **Step 8: Commit scaffold**

```bash
git add -A && git commit -m "chore: scaffold admiral-ds library"
```

## Task 3: First component — Button

**Migration source:** `ButtonOpts` interface + `button()` / `buttonHtml()` from `specd-ds.ts` lines 46–90.

**Files to create:**
- `src/components/Button/AdmiralButton.ts`
- `src/components/Button/AdmiralButton.types.ts`
- `src/components/Button/AdmiralButton.stories.ts`
- `src/components/Button/AdmiralButton.test.ts`
- `src/components/Button/index.ts`

- [ ] **Step 1: Write the failing test**

```ts
// AdmiralButton.test.ts
import { fixture, html } from '@open-wc/testing';
import './AdmiralButton';

test('renders with label', async () => {
  const el = await fixture(html`<admiral-button label="Click me"></admiral-button>`);
  expect(el.shadowRoot ?? el).toContainHTML('Click me');
});

test('applies variant class', async () => {
  const el = await fixture(html`<admiral-button variant="ghost"></admiral-button>`);
  expect(el.querySelector('button')?.className).toContain('btn-ghost');
});
```

Run: `npm test` — expected: FAIL (component not defined)

- [ ] **Step 2: Write `AdmiralButton.types.ts`**

```ts
export interface ButtonProps {
  label?: string;
  variant?: 'primary' | 'ghost' | 'accent' | 'danger';
  size?: 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg';
  full?: boolean;
  disabled?: boolean;
  loading?: boolean;
  type?: 'button' | 'submit' | 'reset';
  icon?: string;
}
```

- [ ] **Step 3: Write `AdmiralButton.ts`**

```ts
import { LitElement, html, nothing } from 'lit';
import { customElement, property } from 'lit/decorators.js';
import type { ButtonProps } from './AdmiralButton.types';

@customElement('admiral-button')
export class AdmiralButton extends LitElement {
  // Light DOM — no shadow root, global CSS applies
  createRenderRoot() { return this; }

  @property() label = '';
  @property() variant: ButtonProps['variant'] = 'primary';
  @property() size: ButtonProps['size'] = 'md';
  @property({ type: Boolean }) full = false;
  @property({ type: Boolean }) disabled = false;
  @property({ type: Boolean }) loading = false;
  @property() type: ButtonProps['type'] = 'button';
  @property() icon = '';

  render() {
    const cls = [
      'btn',
      `btn-${this.variant}`,
      this.size === 'sm' ? 'btn-sm' : this.size === 'lg' ? 'btn-lg' : '',
      this.full ? 'btn-full' : '',
      this.loading ? 'is-loading' : '',
    ].filter(Boolean).join(' ');

    return html`
      <button class=${cls} ?disabled=${this.disabled || this.loading} type=${this.type}>
        ${this.icon ? html`<span class="btn-icon">${unsafeHTML(this.icon)}</span>` : nothing}
        <span class="btn-label">${this.label || html`<slot></slot>`}</span>
      </button>
    `;
  }
}

declare global {
  interface HTMLElementTagNameMap { 'admiral-button': AdmiralButton; }
}
```

- [ ] **Step 4: Run tests — expect PASS**

```bash
npm test -- --reporter=verbose
```

- [ ] **Step 5: Write Storybook story**

```ts
// AdmiralButton.stories.ts
import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/web-components';
import { html } from 'lit';
import './AdmiralButton';

const meta: Meta = {
  title: 'Components/Button',
  tags: ['autodocs'],
  render: (args) => html`<admiral-button variant=${args.variant} label=${args.label}></admiral-button>`,
  argTypes: {
    variant: { control: 'select', options: ['primary', 'ghost', 'accent', 'danger'] },
  },
};
export default meta;

export const Primary: StoryObj = { args: { variant: 'primary', label: 'Scan now' } };
export const Ghost: StoryObj   = { args: { variant: 'ghost',   label: 'Cancel' } };
export const Accent: StoryObj  = { args: { variant: 'accent',  label: 'Export' } };
```

- [ ] **Step 6: Check Storybook renders**

```bash
npm run storybook
```

Expected: Button stories visible at localhost:6006

- [ ] **Step 7: Write React wrapper in `src/react.ts`**

```ts
import React from 'react';
import { createComponent } from '@lit/react';
import { AdmiralButton } from './components/Button/AdmiralButton';

export const Button = createComponent({
  react: React,
  tagName: 'admiral-button',
  elementClass: AdmiralButton,
  events: { onClick: 'click' },
});
```

- [ ] **Step 8: Build and verify both outputs**

```bash
npm run build
ls dist/web-components/  # expect: index.esm.js, index.cjs.js, index.d.ts
ls dist/react/            # expect: index.esm.js, index.d.ts
```

- [ ] **Step 9: Link to Pulse plugin and smoke-test**

```bash
cd ~/Desktop/code/admiral-ds && npm link
cd ~/Desktop/code/pulse && npm link @specd/admiral-ds
# Add to pulse/src/ui.ts: import '@specd/admiral-ds';
# Add to pulse/src/ui.html: <admiral-button variant="primary">Test</admiral-button>
npm run build  # verify plugin still builds
```

- [ ] **Step 10: Commit**

```bash
git commit -m "feat(button): first Lit component with tests, stories, and React wrapper"
```
